nasb.text: The fourth angel poured out his bowl upon the sun, and it was given to it to scorch men with fire.

esv.text: The fourth angel poured out his bowl on the sun, and it was allowed to scorch people with fire.

cnv.text: 第四位天使把碗倒在太陽上，太陽就得了能力，可以用火烤人。

ccb.text: 第四位天使将碗倒在太阳上，太阳就变得炙热如火，可以灼伤人。

csbs.text: 第四位天使把他的碗倒在太阳上，太阳就被准许用火灼烤人。
